title: Report on the 1977 Pre-International Pearl Millet Downy Mildew Nursery(IPMDMN)
abstract: The acceptance of the concept of multilocational testing for identification of stable resistance led in 1976 to the establishment of the international Pearl Millet Disease Resistance Testing Program containing the International Pearl Millet Downy Mildew Nursery (IPMDMN). In the IPMDMN 40-50 elite resistant materials are tested by cooperators throught India and west Africa for reactions to the local downy mildew populations...
